tool.name: prototype_pollution_tester
tool.description: Test for Prototype Pollution vulnerabilities in JavaScript/Node.js applications.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test client-side prototype pollution via URL parameters - Test server-side prototype pollution in Node.js applications - Generate prototype pollution payloads for various targets - Analyze endpoints for prototype pollution vulnerability surface

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action: - test_client: Test client-side prototype pollution - test_server: Test server-side prototype pollution (Node.js) - generate_payloads: Generate prototype pollution payloads - analyze: Analyze endpoint for vulnerability surface

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL for testing. Required for test_client, test_server, analyze.

parameter.name: method
parameter.description: HTTP method (GET or POST, default: POST)

parameter.name: target_type
parameter.description: Payload type: basic, rce_node, ejs_rce, xss, bypass, all (default: all)

returns.description: Prototype pollution test results with vulnerability indicators
